title: Trailer's Look
description: This modpack aims to recreate the trailers exactly
body:
**Welcome to Trailer's Look! If you enjoy the style of the Minecraft Trailers, but can't seem to find a good modpack that recreates that style, then Trailer's Look is for you!**

Trailer's Look uses less used mods, resource packs and shaders to recreate the style of the trailers as close as possible. 

Custom shader settings are included and may be adjusted how ever you'd like! **(Shader settings are recommended for the full experience)**

**Texture Packs Order:**
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a35d074c3f4dc51f708f7b9239e2cdaad19e333c.jpeg)

![Explore the beautiful worlds!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e314be3d4f1358e2479e5db85d0cc1230ef4dbc.png)

![Complete with New Player Animations!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ed1c0e5dccb5e8e6e0ecb7d6060ef5f46c89648.png)

![Go Mining!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/588037be6fa1ab5eb974628064b7743ad5f4f210.png)

![Discover multiple Dimensions in the Trailer Style!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15e5fa62bafc3ec0bde1fdb06cf32a152a3c489a.png)
